_comment: Roster of models to query. Edit `model` strings to match what your accounts can serve, and flip `enabled`. `id` is the slug used for the output filename and in the web UI; keep it stable. `grounded: true` entries attach each provider's official hosted tools (web search, web fetch, code execution) so the model can look up current info — approximating the consumer chat apps. Anthropic IDs are authoritative as of June 2026; Google / OpenAI / Together IDs and the grounded tool identifiers are sensible defaults — VERIFY them against your provider's current docs before a real run.
